title: Fix division by zero in calculator
description:
The `divide()` function in `calculator.py` crashes with ZeroDivisionError when b=0.

Expected behavior: raise a `ValueError` with the message 'Cannot divide by zero'.

Also add a test in `test_calc.py` that verifies the error is raised.

title: Add power function
description:
Add a `power(base: float, exponent: float) -> float` function to `calculator.py`.

It should compute base raised to the exponent power. Add corresponding tests in `test_calc.py`.
